It is worth climbing the hill because the park has good views, not only of these houses.

Painted Ladies are even prettier in person, especially with the city skyline behind them.

The park right in front, Alamo Square Park, is a great place to just sit, relax, or have a picnic. Super chill atmosphere and perfect for photos. Definitely worth stopping by.
Iconic place to see. Not much to do other than see it. But the walk to the painted ladies is great. Make sure to wear comfort shoes as a lot of slopes and down hills
